name: French Fried Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: Garlic salt or celery salt -- OR - grated Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes thoroughly with a brush.
2. Using a potato peeler, cut off long, thin spirals of skin from the potatoes (save some potatoes for another dish).
3. Cover the skins with very cold water and let stand for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
4. Drain the skins and carefully pat them dry with paper towels.
5. Drop the dried skins into deep oil heated to 390°F.
6. Fry until golden brown and crisp, about 1 minute.
7. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with salt or garlic salt, celery salt, or Parmesan cheese.
8. Serve hot.
